## Question 4 — Monthly exchange rates

Compute median, mean and sample variance. Comment on mode.

```{r exchange-rates}
rates <- c(1.306, 1.301, 1.290, 1.266, 1.268, 1.302, 1.317, 1.304, 1.284, 1.268, 1.247, 1.215)
median_rate <- median(rates)
mean_rate <- mean(rates)
sample_variance <- var(rates)
median_rate
mean_rate
sample_variance
```

Comment: the mode is not an appropriate summary for these continuous exchange rates because exact repeated values are unlikely and the sample does not have a clear repeated value.
